query: ASCENDE-RT randomized trial 122 patients enrollment intermediate high risk prostate cancer

results.title: ASCENDE-RT: An Analysis of Treatment-Related Morbidity for a Randomized Trial Comparing a Low-Dose-Rate Brachytherapy Boost with a Dose-Escalated External Beam Boost for High- and Intermediate-Risk Prostate Cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 28433432. 2017/06/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To report the genitourinary (GU) and gastrointestinal (GI) morbidity 
and erectile dysfunction in a randomized trial comparing 2 methods of dose 
escalation for high- and intermediate-risk prostate cancer.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: ASCENDE-RT (Androgen Suppression Combined with Elective 
Nodal and Dose Escalated Radiation Therapy) enrolled 398 men, median age 
68 years, who were then randomized to either a standard arm that included 
12 months of andr
